profiles.role: Trading-day orchestrator and final closeout authority.
Reports, summaries, email, and Telegram notices.
Archives completed AlTrader Kanban tasks and refreshes the Desktop board mirror.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][paper_manual][orchestrator] Open the trading-day workflow
tasks.description: Confirm the live AlTrader task graph on the dedicated `altrader` board, verify the correct specialists are assigned, and then complete this task immediately so the deterministic trading-day sequence can proceed. This graph was created for the current run and is the source of truth. Do not execute specialist implementation work directly. Do not ask follow-up questions unless the board is missing or corrupted.
notes: This kickoff task must complete before specialist execution begins.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][health_only][health_check] Validate startup health and emergency-stop state
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-chirurgeon-startup-gate. This wrapper owns both startup health commands, fallback validation, supported workspace-root or profile-backed context handling, and Kanban completion or blocking. Do not block this task based only on prior crash history. Re-run the deterministic stage wrapper for the current workflow cycle and use only artifacts produced for that cycle. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: Fail-closed gate for the entire trading-day flow.
Produces health artifacts and emergency-state confirmation.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][observe_only][source_intake] Poll Capitol Trades and persist raw artifacts
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-scryer-capitol-intake. This wrapper owns artifact selection, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: Scryer only owns source polling and artifact capture.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][observe_only][normalization] Normalize the disclosure batch
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-runesmith-normalize-events. This wrapper owns normalization, duplicate-only no-action handling, Kanban completion or blocking, and downstream safe closeout. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: Runesmith only owns normalization and quarantine.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][analysis_only][model_analysis] Analyze normalized buy candidates
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-augur-analyze-candidates. This wrapper owns analysis, top-candidate derivation, no-action handling, Kanban completion or blocking, and downstream safe closeout. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: Analysis is advisory and feeds Warden.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][paper_manual][broker_context] Gather paper account and market context
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-coinmaster-broker-context. This wrapper owns the concrete repo execution path for Alpaca account status and Alpaca market data. Do not call abstract Hermes tool names like alpaca_account_status or alpaca_market_data directly. If the upstream cycle has no actionable candidate, this wrapper will resolve the safe no-action path automatically. Do not ask follow-up questions.
notes: Coinmaster only owns fresh broker context.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][risk_review][risk_gate] Apply deterministic sizing and risk gates
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-warden-risk-gate. This wrapper owns risk execution, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: If Warden blocks or fails, no downstream trading task runs.
Failure notifications are expected to reach Bard channels.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][paper_manual][manual_approval] Queue the candidate for human approval
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-overlord-manual-approval. This wrapper owns the approval queue path, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][paper_manual][broker_submission] Submit the approved paper trade
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-gatekeeper-paper-submission. This wrapper owns paper-order submission, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][paper_manual][order_reconciliation] Reconcile order and position state
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-tracker-reconcile-positions. This wrapper owns reconciliation, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: Tracker only owns monitoring and position state.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][daily_cycle][reporting] Write the daily summary and deliver notifications
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-bard-daily-summary. This wrapper owns final reporting, Telegram and email delivery, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not improvise alternate tool names or ask follow-up questions.
notes: Bard owns final daily reporting and operator notifications.
If the normal path blocks before execution, High Marshal may assign Bard a separate incident-summary task.

tasks.title: [AI-Trader][paper_manual][orchestrator] Close the trading-day workflow
tasks.description: Run this stage deterministically from the repo root by executing exactly: python scripts/operations/run_altrader_stage.py --stage-id altrader-highmarshal-closeout. This wrapper owns final closeout, Kanban completion or blocking, and safe no-action or failure handling for this stage. Do not create, decompose, or swarm new tasks during closeout. Do not ask follow-up questions.
notes: High Marshal closes the run after Bard completes the summary path.
